name: harness-forge
description: Hydrate a project to run looping, latticed agentic workflows. A kernel that scaffolds and operates a typed knowledge lattice â€” nine declarative layers Ă— five scopes Ă— a maturity state machine â€” driven by the engine (defineâ†’createâ†’validate at the smallest signal-yielding scope), the compass (scanâ†’rank), and the regeneration loop (operateâ†’ledgerâ†’distillâ†’patterns). Ships an operating agent roster (a harness-builder orchestrator Â· cell-advancer Â· lattice-auditor Â· pattern-distiller Â· cell-regenerator), stdlib gates that mechanize typed naming, the dependency partial-order, anti-reward-hacking protected-verifier writes, budgets, and staleness propagation, an advisory hook that flags naming/staleness on save (never blocks), and a read-only lattice-query MCP over the project's .harness/ state. Self-contained.

harness_dir.title: Harness state directory
